name: io.github.runestone-labs/gatekeeper
description: Run MCP tool calls through Runestone Gatekeeper — policy enforcement, human approval, audit.

environmentVariables.name: GATEKEEPER_ROLE
environmentVariables.description: Policy role this server presents to Gatekeeper for every call. Required.

environmentVariables.name: GATEKEEPER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Gatekeeper server. Default http://127.0.0.1:3847.

environmentVariables.name: GATEKEEPER_AGENT_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Agent name recorded in Gatekeeper audit logs. Default mcp-client.

environmentVariables.name: GATEKEEPER_RUN_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional run-correlation id so calls count toward one per-run budget.
